gist.headline: The Daily Chronicle
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just updated the README with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to feature the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Ensures visitors to the repository always see the most current community creations and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an archivist, updating a giant pixelated bulletin board with new polaroids of community apps. Represents the daily automated README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning small pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning small pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
